title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 486.980 - Electronic notary's e-mail address change, other changes, requirements
text:
486.980.  Electronic notary's e-mail address change, other changes, requirements. — 1.  Within five business days after the change of an electronic notary public's e-mail address, the notary shall electronically transmit to the secretary a notice of the change secured by a registered electronic signature of the notary.
  2.  Any change or addition to the data on the electronic registration form described in section 486.920, including any change to an electronic journal's access instructions, shall be reported within ten days to the secretary.
(L. 2020 H.B. 1655)
